name: @bobnetsec/bob-diff-review
description: Diff review tooling for the Hacker Bob workflow suite

scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:action
scripts.build:action: ncc build dist/action-entrypoint.js --out dist/action --source-map --license licenses.txt && node -e "const fs=require('fs');['index.js','sourcemap-register.js','licenses.txt'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.copyFileSync('dist/action/'+f,'dist/'+f);}catch(e){}});['dist/action/index.js','dist/index.js'].forEach(f=>{fs.writeFileSync(f,fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/[ \\t]+$/gm,''));});"
